Premium Services

Our Services

From window tinting to full detailing packages, we provide premium automotive services.

Window Tinting

Premium ceramic and carbon tint films that block UV rays, reduce heat, and enhance privacy while looking sleek.

  • UV Protection
  • Heat Reduction
  • Privacy Enhancement
  • Lifetime Warranty
CallText

Ceramic Coating

Long-lasting paint protection with hydrophobic technology. Your paint stays showroom-new with minimal maintenance.

  • 7+ Years of Protection
  • Hydrophobic Finish
  • Chemical Resistance
  • Deep Gloss
CallText

Windshield Repair

Professional chip and crack repair to restore visibility and prevent further damage. Quick same-day service.

  • Same-Day Service
  • Chip Repair
  • Crack Repair
  • Insurance Approved
CallText

Clay Paint Restoration

Deep cleaning clay bar treatment that removes embedded contaminants and restores your paint's smooth finish.

  • Removes Contaminants
  • Restores Smoothness
  • Prepares for Wax
  • Safe for Paint
CallText

Paint Correction

Professional paint correction to remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation for a mirror-like finish.

  • Removes Swirls
  • Removes Scratches
  • Restores Clarity
  • Mirror Finish
CallText
Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real reviews from real customers in Westland, MI.

157+ Google Reviews

"Guss and Employees Did a Great Job on My 1 Half Old Truck with Detailing the inside of the truck and Ceramic coating wax. My Truck is Better Than When It was Brand New. I Give His Team more than 5 Star!"

How It Works

Our Process

Simple, transparent, and professional service from start to finish.

01

Call or Text

Contact us at (734) 352-9000 to schedule your appointment or ask questions.

02

Drop Off

Bring your vehicle to our Westland location at 38505 Ford Rd.

03

We Work

Our expert team meticulously details your vehicle using premium products.

04

Drive Happy

Pick up your transformed vehicle and enjoy that new car feeling!

Get In Touch

Ready to Transform Your Vehicle?

Get a free quote or book your appointment today. Walk-ins welcome!
